visuals.title: Machine Learning Taxonomy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Machine Learning Taxonomy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Types of Machine Learning
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Supervised Learning -->
  <rect x="30" y="60" width="110" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="85" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Supervised
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="85" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Learning
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Unsupervised Learning -->
  <rect x="155" y="60" width="110" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Unsupervised
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Learning
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Reinforcement Learning -->
  <rect x="280" y="60" width="110" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="335" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Reinforcement
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="335" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Learning
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Supervised to examples -->
  <line x1="85" y1="120" x2="85" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Supervised examples -->
  <rect x="20" y="150" width="130" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="85" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Classification
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="85" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Regression
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Unsupervised to examples -->
  <line x1="210" y1="120" x2="210" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Unsupervised examples -->
  <rect x="145" y="150" width="130" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Clustering
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Dimensionality
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Reinforcement to examples -->
  <line x1="335" y1="120" x2="335" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Reinforcement examples -->
  <rect x="270" y="150" width="130" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="335" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Rewards/Penalties
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="335" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Agent/Environment
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connecting lines from main types -->
  <line x1="85" y1="190" x2="85" y2="230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="190" x2="210" y2="230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="335" y1="190" x2="335" y2="230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Bottom row: Applications -->
  <rect x="20" y="230" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Spam Detection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="150" y="230" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Customer Segments
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="280" y="230" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Game AI
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
